candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.
Also an explicit top-line sales label; same values as Total Revenue and can serve as alternate reporting label across years.
Operating income, not revenue/sales.

variables.notes: Use as priority list for top-line revenue; both are explicit revenue labels and appear duplicated in value.

candidates.why: Closest income-statement line to direct production/service costs; matches cost of materials/services consumed.
Balance-sheet asset, not period cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected the best direct-cost expense line available on the income statement.

candidates.why: Personnel overhead expense; strong SG&A component.
Share-based compensation is a valid SG&A component.
Personnel-related overhead component.
Dedicated R&D-type operating expense above operating result; should also be included in SG&A when separately reported so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Classic selling/marketing overhead component.
Administrative overhead component.
Residual operating overhead bucket; preferred over total row when components exist.
Overhead subtotal, but less preferred because component rows exist beneath it.
Could be overhead services, but ambiguous and preview is empty; lower priority than clearer SG&A labels.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. Used component rows rather than subtotal 'Other operating expenses'. Included 'Product development expenses' in XSGA_COMPONENTS as well as XRD per rule so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated development expense line above operating result; best match for R&D.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D/development line appears above operating result.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense label for recent years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense label for earlier years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest expense component.
May include non-interest items; excluded to avoid non-recurring/non-interest finance costs.
Total finance-cost bucket, but components exist so less preferred.
Capitalized interest offsets expense and should not be selected as expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest components and avoided broader 'Financial expenses' and ambiguous 'Other financial expenses' to reduce non-interest contamination and double counting.

candidates.row_label: Capital attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests; best match for book equity under the rules.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when parent equity is available.

candidates.row_label: SVOP - Reserve for invested unrestricted equity
candidates.why: Only one equity component, not total book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Capital attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Explicit balance-sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Also explicit NCI line; useful as alternate label.
Income-statement allocation of profit, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Use as priority list for the balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests line.
